title: Talu tenant API
description: The typed contract for a Talu tenant. Helm/Flux validate a HelmRelease's values against this.

projectUuid.description: talu.io/project-uuid stamped on every object; the manager join key.

slug.description: Tenant namespace name; frozen at creation.

allowedUsers.description: Tenant members (emails) allowed to SSH and hold the scoped RBAC role.

sshUserCaPubKey.description: Pomerium SSH User CA public key the VMs trust (injected via valuesFrom cm pomerium-user-ca). Not needed when caTrust.package=true.

caTrust.description: How SSH User CA trust reaches guests: hand-written file (default) or the rotatable talu-ca-trust package.

package.description: Install the talu-ca-trust package (rotatable, auto-updating) instead of hand-writing the trust file.

aptRepoLine.description: apt source line for the talu-ca-trust repo (required when package=true).

vms.description: VMs the tenant owns: name -> spec.

resourceQuota.description: Optional ResourceQuota hard limits (e.g. requests.cpu, requests.memory).

securityGroups.description: Cloud-style allow-rules attached to VMs, rendered to CiliumNetworkPolicies.

dashboards.description: Per-tenant Perses dashboard + prom-label-proxy (reachable only via Pomerium); off by default.

logging.description: VM internal logs. Tier 1 (serial console) is always on; Tier 2 (agent) is opt-in per tenant, pushing to a Cilium-pinned per-tenant ingest gateway that stamps this tenant's namespace.

agent.description: Tier 2: run the in-guest agent + render the per-tenant ingest gateway.

paths.description: Tier 2: extra log files the in-guest agent tails.
